channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Hamas dissolves Gaza government as US-backed peace plan faces Israeli backlash
item.description: Hamas has announced the dissolution of its de facto government in the Gaza Strip, citing a step toward implementing a US-backed peace plan. The move, part of a broader agreement brokered after a fragi...

item.title: Regina YMCA criticizes NDP for failing to consult daycare providers before sending letter to Ottawa
item.description: The Regina YMCA has accused the New Democratic Party (NDP) of neglecting to engage with daycare providers when drafting a letter sent to Ottawa. The organization claims that the lack of consultation r...

item.title: Quezon municipal workers subjected to drug testing initiative
item.description: The Infanta town government, in coordination with the Philippine Drug Enforcement Agency and other partner agencies, conducted an unannounced drug test on 620 municipal workers, including job order, c...

item.title: Khanna and Gallego Withdraw Endorsement from Graham Platner Amid Sexual Assault Allegations
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna and Sen. Ruben Gallego have rescinded their support of Graham Platner, a Democratic candidate for Maine's Senate race, following allegations of sexual assault. The decision comes after ...

item.title: Mother appeals court ruling on child contact with ex-partner accused of rape
item.description: A mother has successfully appealed against a decision by Family Court Judge Robin Tolson KC, who allowed her ex-partner—being investigated for rape—to have overnight contact with their three children....

item.title: Citizen Feedback Not Integrated Into Government Systems in South Africa
item.description: The article discusses how South Africans continue to report issues like broken infrastructure, unreliable water supply, and poor municipal services through various channels, but these complaints often...

item.title: President Trump appeals red card decision for US soccer player
item.description: President Donald Trump intervened with FIFA president Gianni Infantino to challenge a controversial red card decision against US national team striker Folarin Balogun during a match against Bosnia and...

item.title: China's Tianwen 2 Probe Begins Sample Collection Mission on Asteroid Kamo‘oalewa
item.description: The Chinese Tianwen 2 probe has successfully reached its first target, the asteroid Kamo‘oalewa, marking a significant milestone in space exploration. The mission, which began on May 29, 2025, involve...

item.title: Portugal suffer World Cup exit as Spain edge past them in dramatic last-16 clash
item.description: In a tightly contested World Cup clash, Spain secured a dramatic 2-1 victory over Portugal in their last-16 encounter, sending the Portuguese side to an early exit. The match, held in a high-stakes at...

item.title: Tanzanian Entrepreneur Bosco Chuwa Passes Away, Leaving Business Community in Mourning
item.description: The passing of Bosco Chuwa, a prominent Tanzanian businessman known as 'Mshtuko,' has sent shockwaves through the country's commercial sector. His death, confirmed approximately 13 hours ago, has left...

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo's Emotional Response to Portugal's World Cup 2026 Exit
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo, the iconic Portuguese footballer, was seen battling emotions after his team Portugal was eliminated from the 2026 FIFA World Cup. The match against Spain in the Round of 16 ended wi...

item.title: Senator Cayetano to address Marcoleta's legal situation following arrest
item.description: Senator Francisco 'Isko' Cayetano has expressed his intention to personally visit Rodante Marcoleta, a former senator and businessman currently under investigation, following Marcoleta's recent arrest...

item.title: ONGA Dandano: Authentic Arewa Flavors for Northern Kitchens
item.description: ONGA Dandano seasoning cube is revolutionizing Northern Nigerian cooking by offering a convenient way to achieve traditional Arewa flavors. Developed with insights from local culinary traditions, this...

item.title: U.S. Issues Travel Advisories for Venezuela Following Earthquakes and Security Concerns
item.description: The U.S. State Department has updated its travel advisories for Venezuela, citing recent earthquakes and heightened security risks. Following a magnitude 7.2 foreshock and a subsequent magnitude 7.5 e...

item.title: A Week at Gwyneth Paltrow’s Goop Kitchen: A Wellness Food Experiment
item.description: This article chronicles a seven-day experiment with Gwyneth Paltrow's wellness-focused restaurant, Goop Kitchen, highlighting the impact of its health-conscious meals on the author's lifestyle and min...

item.title: Federal-Provincial Development Charge Reduction Program Offers Benefits for Municipalities
item.description: The article discusses the federal-provincial Development Charge Reduction Program, which aims to lower development charges for municipalities, thereby reducing construction costs and making housing mo...

item.title: Legal Challenges Threaten Resilience of Indus Waters Treaty
item.description: The Indus Waters Treaty of 1960, a cornerstone of water-sharing between India and Pakistan, faces renewed scrutiny over its dispute resolution mechanisms. Legal experts warn that unilateral actions by...

item.title: Cuba's Ongoing Power Crisis Amid Fuel Shortages and Sanctions
item.description: Cuba is grappling with its third nationwide power outage in six months, exacerbating an already dire energy crisis. The state electricity company reported a total disconnection from the national grid,...

item.title: Senate Republicans Face Midterm Challenges Amid Declining Trump Approval
item.description: Senate Republicans are grappling with alarming polling data that highlights their struggles in the upcoming midterm elections. President Donald Trump's approval ratings have plummeted, with a Fox News...

item.title: Parliamentary Inquiry Examines Dormant Sites and Lease Compliance
item.description: A parliamentary inquiry in the Australian Capital Territory (ACT) is set to examine the effectiveness of controlled activity orders, which empower the government to enforce lease conditions on propert...
